basics.name: Vincent Palmer
basics.label: Staff Site Reliability Engineer & Platform Engineering Leader
basics.summary: Staff SRE & Platform Engineering leader with 30+ years experience scaling infrastructure from startups to Fortune 500 environments. Specialize in Kubernetes, distributed systems, and enterprise platform engineering with track record of successful architecture implementation.

work.name: Independent Consultant & Architect
work.summary: Advised early-stage AI/Fintech startup on technical architecture, cloud infrastructure, and security practices under strict NDA.
highlights: Provided strategic technical consulting to early-stage AI/Fintech startup, advising on foundational architecture, cloud infrastructure, and security practices under strict NDA.
Researched and developed multiple advanced systems as personal projects, including a multi-RAFT distributed key-value store, an ML-powered HTTP/3 WAF, and an AI-native development platform.

work.name: MedTech Startup
work.summary: Architected and led end-to-end implementation of greenfield prescription delivery platform, serving 10,000+ daily users with 99.95% uptime.
highlights: Led cross-functional team of 8 engineers through complete platform lifecycle from concept to production deployment.
Directed architectural strategy for HIPAA-compliant prescription management, achieving regulatory approval in 6 months.
Spearheaded French market expansion, implementing local compliance requirements and achieving 20% market penetration in first year.

work.name: Feedzai SA
work.summary: Served as company Kubernetes Subject Matter Expert (SME), architecting migration of core FinTech platform to K8s.
highlights: Served as company Kubernetes Subject Matter Expert (SME), architecting migration of core FinTech platform to K8s, achieving 99.9% availability and reducing infrastructure costs by 35%.
Pioneered Crossplane implementation for unified Infrastructure as Code platform, enabling seamless multi-cloud deployments across AWS, GCP, and on-premise with 40% reduction in provisioning time.
Transformed CI/CD and security paradigms, implementing software supply chain security (Attestations/SBOMs) and next-generation internal developer platform, reducing deployment time by 60%.
Established SRE practices including SLI/SLO design, error budget management, and automated incident response, reducing MTTR from 2 hours to 15 minutes.

work.name: Booming Games Ltd
work.summary: Built and led high-performing SRE, Test Automation, and Systems Administration teams (15+ engineers) ensuring 99.95% platform reliability for global B2B gaming platform serving 10M+ daily active users.
highlights: Built and led high-performing SRE, Test Automation, and Systems Administration teams (15+ engineers) ensuring 99.95% platform reliability for global B2B gaming platform serving 10M+ daily active users.

Engineered hybrid infrastructure spanning 5+ bare-metal datacenters and public clouds (AWS, GKE), implementing bare-metal Kubernetes clusters achieving 50% cost savings compared to managed cloud services.
Established comprehensive observability framework with Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack, providing real-time insights into system performance and reducing incident detection time by 80%.
Implemented chaos engineering practices and automated failure recovery systems, improving system resilience and reducing unplanned downtime by 90%.

work.name: KIWI.KI GmbH
work.summary: Led complete migration of IoT infrastructure from legacy VMs to modern Kubernetes-based architecture.
highlights: Led complete migration of IoT infrastructure from legacy VMs to modern Kubernetes-based architecture, achieving zero-downtime migration for apartment door access control system serving 10,000+ units.
Implemented comprehensive CI/CD pipeline from scratch using Jenkins and GitLab CI, reducing deployment time by 75% and eliminating manual deployment errors.
Executed critical Python 2 to Python 3 migration across entire codebase (50+ services), ensuring continued security support and improved performance by 30%.

work.name: ChartMogul Ltd
work.summary: Championed DevOps methodologies and automation across engineering department.
highlights: Championed DevOps methodologies and automation across engineering department, fostering an agile culture that significantly accelerated development and deployment cycles.
Managed a diverse environment including early-adoption Kubernetes, Docker, and traditional VMs.

work.name: Performance Horizon Group
work.summary: Established formal change and release management process.
highlights: Established a formal change and release management process from ground up, implementing automated deployments to improve reliability and velocity.
Architected and deployed a highly available IDS/IPS/NSM solution to enhance platform security.

work.name: Odobo Limited
work.summary: Architected and implemented a continuous delivery platform.
highlights: Architected and implemented a continuous delivery platform integrating JIRA and Bitbucket, automating the full software delivery lifecycle.
Led successful consolidation of multiple configuration management tools into a single, unified Salt-based platform, improving consistency and reducing complexity.

work.name: William Hill Online
work.summary: Managed all production and pre-production deployments in a high-stakes, PCI-DSS compliant online gaming environment.
highlights: Managed all production and pre-production deployments in a high-stakes, PCI-DSS compliant online gaming environment.
Engineered novel deployment techniques that reduced application downtime and streamlined release process.

courses: Linux user since 1994, Advanced Systems Programming expertise throughout career
30+ years continuous professional development in emerging technologies

awards.title: NHS Approved Supplier
awards.summary: Achieved approved supplier status for UK National Health Service (NHS) and secured contracts for UK government and defence clients.

awards.title: Newcastle College Technical Instructor
awards.summary: Recognized as subject matter expert and served as technical instructor at Newcastle College, teaching advanced courses on ActionScript, Lingo, PHP.

awards.title: Community Engagement Recognition
awards.summary: Active member of Berlin tech community (c-base hackerspace) and wider cloud-native ecosystem. Attended multiple KubeCons (Europe) and Nix Conf.

projects.name: Remote Gaming Server Platform
projects.description: Architected a production-grade, regulatory-aware RGS platform in Rust. The project's complexity and scale revealed critical gaps in existing tooling for AI development, security, and global deployment, leading to the creation of the following purpose-built solutions.
highlights: Production-grade regulatory-aware platform architecture
Revealed critical gaps in AI development tooling

projects.name: AI-Native Development Platform
projects.description: To overcome AI context limitations discovered during RGS development, engineered a novel platform featuring a semantic code server (MCP) and workflow management, enabling effective AI-assisted development on large-scale codebases.
highlights: Semantic code server (MCP) integration
Workflow management for AI-assisted development
Large-scale codebase optimization

projects.name: AI-Assisted Hardware Reverse Engineering
projects.description: The AI-native development platform is now being actively applied to accelerate reverse engineering of Allwinner sun50iw12p1 SoC, with public repository serving as a real-world demonstration of its capabilities.
highlights: Active application to Allwinner sun50iw12p1 SoC reverse engineering
Public demonstration of AI-native platform capabilities
